distribution.iterations: temp.dx = (v.originx - temp.radius) - temp.cx; temp.dz = (v.originz - temp.radius) - temp.cz; temp.dy = (v.originy - temp.depth) - temp.cy; temp.x2 = temp.dx * temp.dx; temp.z2 = temp.dz * temp.dz; temp.y2 = (temp.dy * temp.aspect) * (temp.dy * temp.aspect); temp.nx = v.originx * 0.2; temp.ny = v.originy * 0.2; temp.nz = v.originz * 0.2; temp.r = temp.radius * (q.noise(temp.nx + temp.ny, temp.nz + temp.ny) * 0.25 + 0.75); temp.r2 = temp.r * temp.r; return (temp.y2 + temp.x2 + temp.z2) <= temp.r2;
